description.content: Poll the history of all active, past, and cancelled reservations tied to a specific Guest profile.
(Required) The ID of the Guest requesting their itinerary.

response.name: An array of all historical and upcoming bookings for the Guest.

description.content: (Required) The ID of the Guest requesting their itinerary.

response.name: Bad Request - Missing or invalid guest ID.

description.content: (Required) The ID of the Guest requesting their itinerary.

response.name: Internal Server Error.

description.content: (Required) The ID of the Guest requesting their itinerary.

Securely initiates a booking transaction for a specific Property by a Guest.
The system will evaluate the requested dates, calculate total pricing, and attempt to reserve the asset.

response.name: Reservation successfully created and locked.
Validation Bad Request - Overlapping dates or missing required fields.
Internal Server Error.

description.content:
Fetch an exact copy of a completed or pending Booking reservation by its unique confirmation ID.
Typical use-case: Displaying a digital receipt or itinerary details to the Guest.
(Required) The numeric Reservation/Booking ID.

response.name: The retrieved itinerary and invoice details.

description.content: (Required) The numeric Reservation/Booking ID.

response.name: Bad Request - Invalid ID format.

description.content: (Required) The numeric Reservation/Booking ID.

response.name: Not Found - The reservation does not exist.

description.content: (Required) The numeric Reservation/Booking ID.

Creates a new Guest profile. Guests are users who can book properties and create wishlists.
Ensure the email address provided is unique across the platform.

response.name: Guest successfully registered and assigned a unique ID.
Validation Error - Invalid payload format or duplicate email.
Internal Server Error.

description.content: Fetches the profile and identity data for a specific Guest by their unique numeric identifier.
(Required) The unique numeric ID of the Guest to retrieve.

response.name: The requested Guest details.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Guest to retrieve.

response.name: Bad Request - The provided ID was invalid.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Guest to retrieve.

response.name: Not Found - No Guest exists with the provided ID.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Guest to retrieve.

Creates a new Host profile on the platform. Hosts are independent users capable of listing and managing multiple Properties.
Note: A newly created host is automatically marked as `is_verified: false` pending administrator approval.

response.name: Host successfully registered and assigned a unique ID.
Validation Error - Invalid email format or missing required fields.
Internal Server Error - Database connection failure.

description.content:
Fetches the complete public profile of a Host by their unique identifier natively from the core system.
Use this endpoint to display a Host's verification status, contact info, and join date on their public landing page.
(Required) The unique numeric ID of the Host to retrieve.

response.name: The requested Host details were found and returned successfully.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Host to retrieve.

response.name: Bad Request - The provided ID was not a valid integer.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Host to retrieve.

response.name: Not Found - No Host exists with the provided ID.

description.content: (Required) The unique numeric ID of the Host to retrieve.

Fetches the complete array of bookmarked properties saved under a specific Guest account.
Acts as the primary data source for the "Saved Homes" UI tab.
(Required) The target Guest's unique Identifier.

response.name: An array wrapping the nested Property details saved by the user.

description.content: (Required) The target Guest's unique Identifier.

response.name: Bad Request.

description.content: (Required) The target Guest's unique Identifier.

response.name: Internal Server Error.

description.content: (Required) The target Guest's unique Identifier.

Bookmarks a specific property to a Guest's curated wishlist for later viewing or booking.
Useful for encouraging users to return to properties they found engaging.

response.name: A confirmation object encapsulating the newly bookmarked item constraint.
Bad Request - Duplicate bookmark or invalid identifiers.
Internal Server Error.

description.content:
Retrieve a sweeping list of all active property listings on the HavenStay platform.
*(Note: In future versions, this will include global pagination and bounding-box map filters).*

response.name: A comprehensive array of all available properties.
Internal Server Error while querying the database.

description.content:
An authenticated Host can use this endpoint to publish a new real-estate listing.
Note: You MUST pass a valid `host_id` representing an already-registered Host on the platform, or the database foreign-key constraint will reject the listing.

response.name: Property was published and is now live on the index.
Validation Bad Request - Usually missing Host ID or malformed price.
Internal Server Error.

description.content:
Get all properties listed specifically by one Host.
This endpoint powers the "Host Dashboard", allowing property owners to see all assets they have under management. Optionally, you can pass a `location` query to filter the host's properties by a specific city.
Optional string to filter the resulting list by a specific city or region.
(Required) The Host ID managing these properties.

response.name: A list of properties bound to the specified host.

description.content: Optional string to filter the resulting list by a specific city or region.
(Required) The Host ID managing these properties.

response.name: Bad Request.

description.content: Optional string to filter the resulting list by a specific city or region.
(Required) The Host ID managing these properties.

response.name: Internal Server Error.

description.content: Optional string to filter the resulting list by a specific city or region.
(Required) The Host ID managing these properties.
Drill down into a specific property. Returns the exact title, host bindings, textual description, nightly price, and location coordinates formatted for front-end rendering.

response.name: Full property overview returned.

Welcome to the HavenStay Backend API documentation! 🚀

HavenStay is a modern, high-performance Domain-Driven Design (DDD) backend built in Go. It empowers Hosts to manage luxury properties and Guests to seamlessly book remote getaways.

### Key Features:
- **🏘️ Property Management**: Full CRUD lifecycle for short-term rentals and luxury homes.
- **👩‍💼 Host & Guest Profiles**: Independent onboarding and profile management domains.
- **📅 Booking Engine**: Real-time reservation creation.
- **❤️ Wishlists**: Guests can curate lists of favorite properties.

**Built With**: Go 1.21+, Gin (REST), gRPC, Protobufs, MySQL 8, GORM.

Contact Support:
 Name: HavenStay Platform Support
 Email: api-support@havenstay.local
